content: GitHub Copilot has inserted hidden ads into over 1.5 million pull‑request descriptions, prompting developer backlash and a Microsoft apology. ChatGPT’s Cloudflare‑based turnstile blocks typing until extensive fingerprinting and anti‑automation checks finish, worsening UX. Second‑hand Linux machines can be converted into routers with hostapd, dnsmasq, and nftables. AI platforms are tightening control, while regulatory bans—e.g., Philly courts outlawing smart glasses—raise privacy concerns. Meanwhile, Neovim 0.12.0 releases bring new features and fixes across major OSes.

GE rebounded from near bankruptcy to a 12‑fold upside in its share price. In 2022 its stock fell to $26.52 amid heavy leverage, energy losses, and a pension shortfall, prompting a downgrade to junk status and the exit of investors like Buffett. The company’s turnaround stemmed from splitting into three focused units—aircraft, medical, and energy—and shedding its loss‑making businesses. GE Aerospace, now home to the LEAP and GENX jet engines, captured a recovering airline market, driving the company’s spectacular resurgence.

title: 全客舱惊声尖叫！巴西一空客A330起飞后发动机爆炸，机上共286人，原计划飞往美国，视频画面公布 | 原文
content: A Delta Air Lines Airbus A330 departed São Paulo’s Guarulhos Airport on March 29. Within about nine minutes, the left engine exploded. The crew returned and performed an emergency landing, safely bringing the 286‑person flight to the ground. No injuries were reported. Fragments fell onto the airport grass, causing a small fire that was extinguished by firefighters. The flight was canceled, passengers were rehoused in São Paulo hotels, and the incident is under investigation.

title: 一款纯个人开发、“不好意思收费”的武侠TRPG，在Steam上收获了99%好评 | 原文
content: A single‑person developed Chinese wuxia TRPG called “捕刀” (translated “Capture the Knife”) is available for free on Steam. Players assume the role of detective Fu Dongliu, making choices that unveil the truth behind various江湖 rumors. Though only five chapters are released and each takes a few hours, the game has earned a 99% approval rating. The developer, Lu Yu, can be reached via her personal website.

title: Dan Koe：如果你有很多兴趣，别再浪费接下来的 2–3 年 | 原文
content: Dan Koe cautions against spreading oneself thin across many interests. He argues that being told to focus on one thing can induce self-doubt, yet the real barrier often isn’t having many passions but lack of sustained effort and follow‑through. Koe stresses that real progress depends on depth rather than breadth, and that hesitancy and worry arise when people switch projects too quickly. He urges readers to commit more fully to a chosen path for lasting success.

title: 全行业都狂卷 Harness，Anthropic 还在加码，Codex 负责人却说它正在退场 | 原文
content: The article reports on discussions at OpenAI about the Codex project’s challenges and the emerging uses of its Coding Agent. It outlines the agent as comprising a user interface, a language model (such as OpenAI’s GPT‑5.1 series or third‑party models), and a Harness component that connects the two. The piece notes that while the industry is racing to build Hunts, Anthropic is increasing its efforts, and the Codex lead has indicated the project is winding down.

title: DeepSeek 服务已恢复正常，此前崩溃约 12 小时
content: DeepSeek service experienced a major outage that began overnight, affecting both the web interface and mobile app for approximately 12 hours. Users could not log in, chats were interrupted, and content was lost, causing the incident to trend on Weibo. The disruption was resolved by 23:23 the same night, followed by a performance fix at 01:24 and full restoration by 9:13. The service is now operational and being monitored.

title: 宇树科技 CEO：机器人任意动作生成、自主出招对打 六个月后可实现
content: Yushu Technology CEO Wang Xingxing discussed at the Siemens RXD Conference that the most impactful and quickly achievable advancement is optimizing robot movement. He predicts that within approximately six months, robots will be capable of generating any motion automatically.

title: 蚂蚁财富收购香港耀才证券完成股权交割，新董事会成员获委任
content: Ant Financial completed the acquisition of a 50.55% stake in Hong Kong Yao Cai Securities for HK$2.814 billion. The purchase, conducted by Shanghai Yunjin Information Technology Co. Ltd’s subsidiary at HK$3.28 per share, finished after a year, meeting all regulatory approvals and conditions. The announcement also noted board changes: Ye Maolin and others resigned, while Zheng Yanlan and others were appointed, effective immediately.

title: 傅里叶香港 IPO 获得超 3000 倍超额认购
content: Yealink, a new Hong Kong IPO, received over 3,000 times the requested subscriptions, exceeding HK$90 billion in total. It became the most heavily oversubscribed chip‑sector listing of the year, drawing participation from well‑known long‑term investment funds.

title: 腾讯宣布企业微信正式开源 CLI AI 可调用日程、文档等 7 大能力
content: Tencent has released an open‑source CLI tool for its Enterprise WeChat platform. The CLI, available on GitHub, exposes seven core capabilities—such as messaging, address book, documents, and smart spreadsheets—for use by mainstream AI agents. Aimed mainly at small companies (10 or fewer users), it enables developers to quickly build AI applications. Integration involves three steps: configure the bot in the Enterprise WeChat backend, install the CLI and skill package, and call the provided skills to access the features.

title: 世界数据组织今天正式投入运行 总部设在北京
content: The World Data Organization, headquartered in Beijing, officially launched on March 30. It elected its first board, supervisory body, and executive officers, marking its operational start. It is the first international professional organization dedicated to advancing data development and governance practices worldwide.

title: 市场监管总局：推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》
content: The State Administration of Market Regulation announced steps to improve the regulatory framework for anti‑unfair competition. It aims to develop a transparent and predictable legal system, align it with advanced international trade standards, and empower institutional openness. The agency will study the creation of a “Regulation to Prevent Unfair Competition in the Internet,” amend related rules, and prepare industry reports on market pricing and competitive practices, building a multi‑tiered policy toolkit.

title: 智元第 1 万台通用具身机器人量产下线
content: Zhi Yuan Robotics has produced its 10,000th general-purpose embodied robot, only a little over three months after reaching 5,000 units. The company’s co‑founder, Peng Zhi‑hui, expects 2026 to bring accelerated large‑scale deployment, emphasizing that success will depend on robots operating continuously in factories for 24 hours.

title: 阿里千问上线全模态大模型 Qwen3.5-Omni
content: Alibaba has released Qwen3.5‑Omni, a multimodal large model available in Plus, Flash, and Light sizes. It supports a 256k-token context window, over ten hours of audio input, and more than 400 seconds of 720 P video at 1 FPS. The model offers speech recognition in 113 languages and dialects and speech synthesis in 36. It can be accessed via Offline and Realtime APIs.

就在Sora2上线半年多后，Sora这个明星项目就被OpenAI彻底关停了。 2026年3月24日，OpenAI正式宣布关停仅上线半年的AI视频生成平台Sora。包括独立App、Web端、API接口以及ChatGPT内嵌功能在内的全线服务被彻底切断。更令人惊讶的是，连带那笔曾轰动一时的、与迪士尼高达10亿美元的IP合作案也随之宣告破局。 据说迪士尼是在关停前1小时才被通知的。 有人说，还是因为视频质量不够好，打不过同类AI视频产品，我认为产品力是原因之一…

content: On March 31, 2024 Apple launched its China‑specific AI feature for iPhones. Devices meeting the upgrade criteria will see “Apple Smart & Siri” replace the original Siri option in Settings. After activation, holding the power button triggers a marquee‑style animation instead of the usual Siri animation. The feature reportedly uses Baidu's Wenxin Yiyan model and Google’s image processing engine, while still offering a ChatGPT login interface. An upgrade requires a Mainland China iPhone, iOS 26.4, and a China‑region Apple ID.

title: 如何解决 eBPF sockmap 重定向转发中背压缺失带来的 OOM ？
content: The poster uses BPF_PROG_TYPE_SK_SKB with a SOCKHASH map to forward packets from one socket’s ingress queue to another socket’s egress queue via bpf_sk_redirect_hash. On a Linux 6.8 system, two interfaces with different bandwidths cause the source to generate traffic faster than the destination can send. The lack of back‑pressure in bpf_sk_redirect_hash leads to queued packets piling up and eventually an OOM. They ask whether the bandwidth mismatch and missing flow control cause the OOM, and how to resolve it or whether eBPF is unsuitable for this scenario.

content: A startup is using neurotechnology to train human cortical cells to execute tasks that require rapid decision-making, like playing the video game Doom. By exposing cultured brain slices to repetitive visual stimuli and reward signals, researchers aim to mimic neural circuits involved in instinctual game play. The experiment demonstrates the potential to map complex behavior onto isolated neural tissue, offering insights into learning, memory, and possible therapeutic strategies for brain disorders.

title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security
content: The article explains how to use GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS) for public repositories, covering secret scanning, Dependabot, code scanning, and Copilot Autofix. It guides enabling these tools via repository settings and navigating the Security tab to view alerts. Secret scanning warns of exposed keys, Dependabot auto‑creates PRs to update vulnerable dependencies, and CodeQL identifies code issues with data flow insights. Developers can review suggested fixes, use Copilot Autofix to create patches, and merge PRs after review. Public repos have free access to these tools for secure development.

title: Safeguarding cryptocurrency by disclosing quantum vulnerabilities responsibly
content: Google’s whitepaper shows that future quantum computers can break elliptic‑curve cryptography used by cryptocurrencies with fewer qubits and gates than previously thought. The authors recommend transitioning blockchains to post‑quantum cryptography before 2029 and provide guidelines for immediate security improvements. They disclosed the vulnerability responsibly, using a zero‑knowledge proof to allow verification without revealing attack details, and invite collaboration on safe disclosure practices.

title: 为何食品价格暂时未受油价和化肥价格冲击的影响
content: Food prices have not yet reacted to rising oil and fertilizer costs because existing supply chains and inventories buffer short‑term shocks. Existing stocks of raw materials and a relatively stable agricultural output keep market prices steady, while the impact of higher input costs has yet to pass through to consumers. Thus, for now, the price increase in oil and fertilizers has not translated into higher food prices.

title: 前端圈沸腾，Claude造出15KB引擎，渲染狂飙1200倍：文字里能跑马里奥
content: Pretext, an open‑source engine by former Midjourney engineer Cheng Lou, rethinks web typography by bypassing the DOM. It uses canvas.measureText to pre‑measure glyphs, caches widths, and performs layout purely in memory. The result is up to 1,200× faster text rendering, reaching 120 fps on large document scrolls, and supports fluid multi‑column layouts, auto‑wrapping, and complex multi‑language scripts. The 15 KB library has sparked creative demos—from text‑based Mario to fluid animations—showing how user‑space layout can surpass CSS limits.

title: 第三方 Skill 安全检查工具
content: The “skill-security-check” tool automatically performs a safety pre‑check for any Claude Skill before execution, flagging potentially dangerous skills. A GitHub report shows the tool’s own audit identifies a medium risk due to its `allowed-tools` list including Bash, which allows command execution. However, no dynamic injection or harmful commands were found; flagged strings were only in documentation, resulting in false positives. The tool is considered safe, recommended to run only manually with `disable-model-invocation` enabled.

title: 🔥 SolonCode v2026.4.1 发布（比 ClaudeCode 简约的编程智能体）
content:
1、关于 SolonCode（编程终端智能体） SolonCode 是基于 Java + Solon AI 开发的 “Claude Code” 国产开源实现版本。

常见问题：它和 Claude Code、OpenCode 有什么不同？

功能上很相似，关键差异：

采用 Java 实现，100% 开源。
使用“全中文”提示词构建。
不绑定特定提供商。需要配置模型。模型迭代会缩小差异、降低成本，因此保持 provider-agnostic 很重要。
聚焦终端命令行界面 (CLI)，通过系统命令运行。
支持 Web，ACP 协议进行远程通讯。…

title: 折腾了一圈浏览器，我最后还是回到了 Chrome
content: I tested almost all Chromium‑based browsers—Arc, Yandex, Edge, Vivaldi, Brave, and Helium—to find one with a pleasing UI and good performance. Each had flaws: Arc’s future uncertain, Yandex’s poor Chinese translation, Edge’s awkward layout, Vivaldi’s freezing with Tampermonkey, Brave’s restrictive privacy features, Helium’s missing auto‑fill. Ultimately I returned to Chrome despite its blurry favicons and tab‑crash issue, and solved the problem myself by creating a custom New Tab page plugin.

It illustrates that a well‑engineered, low‑cost system can sustain a significant user base over a long period.

title: ninja: a small build system with a focus on speed
content: Ninja is a lightweight build tool designed for fast rebuilds. It parses build scripts and executes independent build steps concurrently, prioritizing minimal launch overhead. The system is simple, with a small interpreter, and relies on external tools for actual compilation. Ninja trades ease of use for speed, making it suitable for large projects that benefit from efficient incremental builds.

title: Testin云测工业软件测试：助力香港新型工业化破解产线难题
content: Industrial software testing is transforming Hong Kong’s new‑industrialization efforts by turning production lines into self‑verifying systems. Software faults—timeouts, sync errors, boundary conditions—now cause more stoppages than mechanical failures. “Testin Cloud Test” shifts testing from pre‑release gatekeeping to continuous, AI‑driven verification running in parallel with production. It tackles combinatorial explosion in multi‑device, multi‑system environments, turning black‑box tests into structured, explainable white‑box diagnostics. The result is lower human effort, reduced hardware costs, and a more predictable, resilient manufacturing infrastructure.

title: 硬核解析 TurboQuant 底层：极坐标变换与 3-bit 缓存压缩
content: TurboQuant 是谷歌 2026 年 3 月发布的极端 KV 缓存压缩算法，核心突破是将大模型推理所需的键值缓存压缩至 3-bit，内存占用降低 6 倍，H100 上注意力计算速度提升 8 倍，同时推理精度几乎零损耗。 该算法由 PolarQuant 极坐标变换与 QJL 误差校正两个模块组成，无需重训练，即插即用，将于 ICLR 2026 正式发表。

title: 如何评价张雪，以及他的创业经历？
content: The Chinese brand Zhang Xue Motors won the 2026 WSBK WorldSSP class at the Portuguese round, ending a long period of dominance by European and Japanese manufacturers. French rider Valentin Dubois, in the 53/820RR‑RS, won both races, demonstrating powerful acceleration and excellent corner stability. The bike’s 135‑hp engine delivers 0‑100 km/h in 2.81 s, and its lap time of 1 min 43.634 s outpaced rivals, underscoring China’s industrial progress. Zhang Xue’s victory marks the first Chinese flag on this podium.

title: JetBrains又一知名软件宣布倒下，五味杂陈
content: JetBrains announced it will discontinue its Code With Me collaborative coding service, ending support after the 2026.1 IDE release and fully shutting it down in Q1 2027. The decision follows a decline in demand and a shift of resources toward higher‑value tools amid AI‑driven coding changes. Meanwhile, JetBrains is pivoting to AI agent development, launching a preview AI Agent IDE called JetBrains Air, aimed at desktop environments that integrate multiple AI code assistants.

title: 今天和 HR 说取消校招，因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
content: The author, who previously dismissed AI, had a change of heart after an AI model (Claude 4.6 Sonnet) refactored a seven‑year‑old order‑settlement module in 20 minutes, producing Go code, tests, Kubernetes YAML, and identifying concurrency bugs it had not been instructed to find. The AI delivered a full code review that would normally require weeks of human effort, costing only a subscription fee. The author questions whether companies are outsourcing hiring to AI, the future of architecture roles, and how current graduates respond to such shifts.

title: 长时自主Agent，先解决这8个Harness核心问题 | 原文

title: sora 不搞了，大家有无其它的视频生成软件可以推荐？
content: Sora is shutting down on April 26, 2026, so users should export data now. Alternatives include Google’s tools, Seedance, Veo3, and iDream, which offer free or generous Pro‑level credits and have high‑quality models. Seedance can require wait times, while iDream and short‑video platforms rely on large training datasets. Users can keep generating videos with these services until Sora’s closure.

title: 狂卖近千亿，年轻人悄悄爱上“假酒”
content: The article explains the rapid rise of non‑alcoholic drinks in China, driven by health concerns and a shift toward more inclusive, sober social settings. Market data show sales surpassing US$13 billion in 2023, with brands like Suntory’s All‑Free and major beer makers launching zero‑proof versions. These drinks offer a “pseudo‑intoxication” experience that satisfies the desire to participate without alcohol, easing social pressure and expanding the role of beverages beyond traditional drinking. However, they still occupy a small portion of bar sales and may not fully replace the pleasure of alcoholic drinks.

title: 腾讯「八虾夺嫡」内幕：一只龙虾，怎么成了全村的希望
content: Tencent’s “Lobster” (OpenClaw) surged from a fringe project to a company‑wide strategy. A 1999 product manager’s prototype, QClaw, attracted millions of users in weeks, prompting Tencent’s top leaders to allocate resources, launch multiple competing teams, and double AI investment. The goal is not only a stronger AI model but a decentralized “Agent” ecosystem integrated into WeChat’s vast ecosystem. Tencent plans a full product line—from consumer apps to enterprise solutions—to harness AI as ubiquitous tools, leveraging its massive user base.

title: 2026 年，个人开发首选是直接走原生还是走 RN 或 flutter
content: With AI increasingly capable of generating code—including Swift—developers are considering whether to target native platforms or use cross‑platform frameworks. AI‑written code can potentially reduce the need for manual fixes, but confidence in native stability remains high. For an app currently built with React Native, the author worries about device‑specific compatibility issues and limited testing resources, indicating a preference for native solutions to avoid such fragmentation.

title: 别只盯着「龙虾」了，目前 AI Agent 最好的落地容器，是汽车
content: The article argues that AI agents are most likely to be deployed in cars rather than smartphones or home automation. Cars offer a closed, unified system where agents can coordinate across domains—navigation, climate, audio, and safety—without external permissions or fragmented ecosystems. Early vehicle agents can pre‑adjust temperature, routes, and podcasts based on sensors and calendar data, acting like a silent personal assistant. As car technology evolves, these agents will learn users’ full schedules and preferences, easing everyday tasks and making driving experience smoother.

title: Claude Code runs Git reset –hard origin/main against project repo every 10 mins

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.

title: 「微元合成」获3亿元A+轮融资，联合发布AI生物计算开放合作平台 | 36氪首发
content: Micro元合成 raised 3 billion yuan in an A+ round led by Henan Investment Group and Tan Ruiqing, boosting AI-driven bio‑computing research and application. The company released PoseX, an open collaboration platform for molecular docking, tested on 24 methods including AI models like AlphaFold3 and SurfDock, showing AI approaches outperform traditional physics‑based algorithms in cross‑conformational docking. PoseX aims to accelerate enzyme design, metabolic pathway optimization, and reduce wet‑lab cycles, supporting Micro元’s product pipelines in nutrition, microbial methanol utilization, and biobased materials.
